name: Ben E. King
abstract: Benjamin Earl King (né Nelson; September 28, 1938 – April 30, 2015) was an American soul and R&B singer and songwriter. He rose to prominence as one of the principal lead singers of the R&B vocal group the Drifters, singing the lead vocals on three of their biggest hit singles: "There Goes My Baby", "This Magic Moment", and "Save the Las…

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Robinson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...they were playing an arrangements of “Stand By Me,” the Ben E. King song.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Robinson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Al Chez
about_quotes.evidence: I was like, “Oh there I am playing with you know Ben E. King and John Fogarty and Sting”
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Chez interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, February 13, 2019
